MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT SHIMMICK/DANNY JOINT VENTURE'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Brendan J. Hennessey to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Order signed.
